query:
-- For ASG Hail, how many UCXcel Webex Basic services exist and what is the revenue on each?
SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.external_id,
  s.plan_name,
  s.monthly_revenue,
  s.monthly_cost,
  s.cost_source,
  s.billing_item_id,
  bi.description AS billing_item_desc,
  bi.line_amount AS billing_item_amount,
  bi.quantity AS billing_item_qty,
  bi.unit_amount AS billing_item_unit_price
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.id = s.billing_item_id
WHERE s.customer_id = (SELECT id FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%ASG Hail%' LIMIT 1)
  AND s.plan_name LIKE '%UCXcel Webex Basic%'
ORDER BY s.id;
